role_title: GTM Strategy & Operations, Enterprise Business Partner

seniority.level: Senior IC (likely Senior Manager / Principal level)
level_signals: 5+ years of experience in sales strategy, revenue operations, management consulting, or GTM operations
Proven executive stakeholder management skills — presenting to and influencing C-suite and VP-level leaders
Comp range $270K-$310K OTE, consistent with senior individual contributor at Anthropic
MBA or advanced degree preferred signals senior-level expectation

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 5+ years of experience in sales strategy, revenue operations, management consulting, or GTM operations
Proficiency in SQL or R — you can independently write queries, build models, and extract insights from large datasets without relying on others
Mastery of spreadsheet tools and data (Google Sheets / Excel) — pivot tables, complex formulas, data modeling, and scenario analysis are second nature to you
Strong analytical skills with the ability to translate data into actionable insights and compelling executive narratives
Deep experience with GTM systems like Salesforce and business intelligence tools (Looker, Tableau, etc.)
Proven executive stakeholder management skills — you have a track record of presenting to and influencing C-suite and VP-level leaders in high-intensity environments.
An ability to pull signal through noise and an internal drive to create clarity. You strive for simplicity as the most elegant solution to complex situations.
A demonstrated ability to build trust with and influence a variety of stakeholders, including colleagues and other members of the GTM Strategy and Revenue Operations team
A healthy balance of idealism with pragmatism and the highest internal bar for excellence. You have been accountable for the results of your recommendations.
Track record of driving forward high-growth sales organizations
Disciplined project management and exceptional communication and interpersonal abilities
Bachelor's degree required; MBA or advanced degree preferred

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Direct experience in a commercial role (pre-sales, customer-facing, partnerships, founder, etc.)
Experience in both large Enterprises in technology, finance or professional services, in addition to fast-paced startup building
Experience with AI/ML companies and consumption business models
Prior experience building frameworks for sales use cases or value propositions
Background in scaling sales organizations through 2-3x+ growth periods
Bachelor's degree required; MBA or advanced degree preferred

scope.surface: AMER Enterprise segment — GTM strategy, revenue operations, and executive business partnership
scope.business_model: B2B enterprise SaaS / AI consumption model
primary_metrics_inferred: Sales performance and operational efficiency metrics
core_responsibilities: Partner with Global and AMER Enterprise segment leaders to analyze and refine segment-specific strategy including territory planning, resource allocation, performance to plan, and growth initiatives
Analyze sales performance metrics and develop insights to optimize segment performance and improve efficiency using SQL, R, or Python to query, model, and visualize data at scale
Serve as a trusted strategic advisor to senior and executive stakeholders across the GTM organization
Develop and maintain use case frameworks to capture and standardize how customers derive value
Partner with GTM teams to evolve and refine sales motions and best practices across segments and regions
Help prepare materials for executive reviews and planning sessions
Build and maintain dashboards, models, and ad hoc analyses in spreadsheets and BI tools

compensation.equity_form: optional equity donation matching mentioned; OTE range includes sales commissions/bonuses and base salary

green_flags: OTE compensation range disclosed and competitive ($270K-$310K)
Clear scope: AMER Enterprise segment with named cross-functional partners
Explicit encouragement to apply even without meeting every qualification
Role described as evolving rapidly, signaling upward growth potential
Technical depth expectations clearly articulated (SQL/R/Python, BI tools)
red_flags: Hybrid policy requires at least 25% office time; limited city options (San Francisco implied as HQ) may eliminate fully-remote candidates
OTE range is stated but base/commission split is not disclosed — actual base salary unknown
Python is mentioned in responsibilities ('SQL, R, or Python') but not listed as a must-have in the requirements section — creates a mild inconsistency
Role requires both deep technical data skills and executive-level stakeholder management — a rare combination that narrows the candidate pool significantly

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range + years requirement + executive stakeholder expectations)

Compensation is described as OTE for a sales role, but the role title and responsibilities are operations/strategy, not quota-carrying sales. It's unclear whether this role carries a sales quota or if the OTE structure is used for compensation benchmarking purposes only.
